roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
/CAL SENTENCING/TWS/CH4 ISS PROB PROB 3 Y PJ 10D/CTS 10 /VF2 150/WS/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:FINES AND FEES ARE STAYED BY THE COURT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL  BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THECOMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 4, HS11350(A), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:004/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/SAORD/NTW60/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDPX:09-09-19/987,2/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PHC/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:30,000/BWNUM:1ST/X:  1     OF   2    BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
